title: An Act to Implement the Recommendations of the Right to Know Advisory Committee Concerning Denials of Public Records Requests
last_house_action: 5/27/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/27/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

actions.description: Representative KUHN for the Joint Standing Committee on Judiciary pursuant to the Maine Revised Statutes, Title 1, section 411, subsection 6, paragraph G reports that the Bill be REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY and printed pursuant to Joint Rule 218. Report was READ and ACCEPTED . The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Report READ and ACCEPTED , in concurrence. On motion by Senator Carney of Cumberland REFERRED to the Committee on Judiciary and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 218, in concurrence.

Reports READ . On motion of Representative KUHN of Falmouth, the Majority Ought to Pass Report was ACCEPTED . The Bill was READ ONCE . Under suspension of the rules, the Bill was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

Reports Read On motion by Senator CARNEY of Cumberland the Majority Ought to Pass Report ACCEPTED . Bill READ ONCE Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED in concurrence.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.
